name: io.github.mcflamingo/local-intel
description: LocalIntel — agentic business intelligence for St. Johns County FL (32081 + 32082). Spatial context, tidal momentum scores, spending zones, corridor analysis, and staleness-graded data. 11 tools covering local_intel_context, search, nearby, zone, corridor, changes, stats, tide, signal, bedrock, and the premium local_intel_for_agent composite endpoint. $0.01–$0.05/call in pathUSD via Tempo mainnet.
